hero.description: I replace Google, Microsoft, and AWS with open source alternatives you actually control. Self-hosted in Sweden. GDPR compliant by design. No vendor lock-in.
services.title: Your cloud, replaced.
services.description: Google Workspace → Proton. AWS → your own servers. Zapier → n8n. I build the open source stack that gives you actual control.
services.cloud.title: Self-Hosted Infrastructure
services.cloud.description: Coolify instead of Vercel. Zitadel instead of Auth0. Your servers in Sweden, Germany, or wherever compliance requires. You own everything.
services.shield.title: Compliance Scanning
services.shield.description: SVAR scans your entire stack for GDPR and NIS2 issues. I built it. I've scanned 599 law firms with average score 62/100. Yours can be 100.
services.workflow.title: Workflow Automation
services.workflow.description: n8n replaces Zapier. Runs on your server. No per-task pricing, no data leaving your infrastructure. I build the workflows, you own them forever.
process.title: Scan. Fix. Monitor.
process.description: No six-month discovery phase. I scan your site, tell you what's wrong, and fix it if you want.
process.step1.title: Free Scan
process.step1.subtitle: Takes 2 minutes
process.step1.action: I run your domain through SVAR. 16 security and compliance checks.
process.step1.result: A score out of 100, a PDF report, and a list of what to fix. No sales call required.
process.step2.title: Review
process.step2.subtitle: 30-min call
process.step2.action: We go through the results. I explain what matters and what's noise.
process.step2.result: You understand your actual risk level. Most issues are easier to fix than you think.
process.step3.title: Fix
process.step3.subtitle: Hours, not months
process.step3.action: Security headers: 15 minutes. SSL config: 30 minutes. Email security: 1 hour. Most sites go from 60 to 90+ in a day.
process.step3.result: You're compliant. You have documentation for legal. Done.
process.step4.title: Monitor
process.step4.subtitle: Optional
process.step4.action: Monthly scans. I catch issues before they become problems.
process.step4.result: You stay compliant without thinking about it. I alert you if something changes.
process.bottomCta: Want to see where you stand?
about.description1: A year ago my own site scored 45/100 in security. Embarrassing for someone in this business. I fixed it. Today: 100/100 with a 10% attack surface (industry average is 60-70%).
about.description2: I learned what actually matters and what's just noise. Now I help businesses get compliant without the usual six-month consulting project. Law firms, tech companies, consultants. Anyone handling sensitive data who needs GDPR solved, not discussed in meetings.
about.value1.title: I test on myself first
about.value1.description: Before I recommend anything, I've already done it on my own infrastructure.
about.value2.title: Real numbers, not promises
about.value2.description: 599 law firms scanned. Average: 62/100. 17 cybersecurity companies. Average: 73/100.
about.value3.title: One person, no handoffs
about.value3.description: You talk to me. I do the work. No account managers or junior consultants.
about.reason1.description: My own security score. I don't sell what I don't use.
about.reason2.description: Swedish law firms I've scanned. I know the patterns.
about.reason3.description: My attack surface. Industry average is 60-70%.
contact.description: Email works best. I usually reply within a few hours.
contact.testimonial1.text: "Tom moved our entire email system to Proton and set up automated workflows for client onboarding. What we thought would take weeks took three days. Our compliance officer finally stopped worrying."
contact.testimonial1.name: Kim Lindström
contact.testimonial2.text: "We went from scattered spreadsheets to a system that actually works. Tom didn't oversell, he just fixed what was broken and left."
contact.testimonial2.name: Rick Bjelk
contact.booking.title: Or book a call
contact.booking.description: 30 minutes. I'll scan your site live and walk through the results.
contact.booking.note: Free · No pitch deck · Just answers
footer.description: EU hosting, security scanning, and automation. Based in Malmö.
footer.trustDescription: GDPR & NIS2 compliant infrastructure with full data sovereignty.
footer.bottomTagline: Data Sovereignty by Design. Built for the NIS2 Era.
calculator.title: Opportunity Cost Calculator
calculator.description: See how much manual work is costing you. Calculate the real price of slow processes and repetitive tasks.
notFound.title: Lost in the Digital Void
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Let's get you back on track.
borderTracer.description: Enter any domain to see where its data goes. Find out which servers, services, and third parties handle your data, and which laws apply.
borderTracer.scanFailedAlert: Scan failed: {error}. Please check the domain and try again.
borderTracer.headlineStrongUS: Strong US data sovereignty. Infrastructure is well-aligned.
borderTracer.headlineModerateUS: Moderate sovereignty. Some data flows outside US jurisdiction.
borderTracer.headlineSignificantUS: Significant foreign exposure. Data resides across multiple jurisdictions.
borderTracer.headlineWeakUS: Weak US sovereignty. Most infrastructure is outside US control.
insights.description: Practical guides on infrastructure, compliance, and automation. Complex topics explained in plain language.
insights.ctaDescription: We help businesses meet GDPR and NIS2 requirements with practical, secure infrastructure.
insights.pageDescription: Practical guides on digital infrastructure, security compliance, and workflow automation for businesses navigating GDPR, NIS2, and modern IT.
meta.defaultDescription: Move off US cloud providers to infrastructure you control. Self-hosted CRM, chat, automation and European alternatives. No vendor lock-in.
meta.pageTitle.home: Bright Interaction | Own Your Digital Infrastructure
hero.lightDescription: You pay per seat. Per workflow. Per API call. Per GB. Every tool stacks up: CRM, email, chat, automation, e-signatures. Suddenly you're spending €200/month per employee on software you don't control and can't leave.
realCost.title: Calculate your SaaS tax
realCost.description: Pick the tools you use. Drag the slider. See what you pay now, what servers actually cost, and what you'd pay with us.
realCost.teamSizeLabel: How many people on your team?
realCost.hetznerNote: Real server prices from Hetzner Cloud. Open source software is free.
realCost.implNote: These numbers show recurring maintenance costs only. A one-time implementation fee applies for setup, migration, and configuration, tailored to your stack and needs. Contact us for a full quote.
realCost.explainer1.title: We handle everything
realCost.explainer1.text: Updates, monitoring, backups, security patches. You focus on your business. We keep the lights on.
realCost.explainer2.title: Implementation + maintenance
realCost.explainer2.text: One-time setup fee for migration and configuration. Then a flat maintenance fee to keep everything running.
realCost.explainer3.title: No lock-in. Ever.
realCost.explainer3.text: No per-seat pricing. Your data, your servers. Leave anytime with everything.
services.light.title: Your cloud stack, swapped.
services.light.description: Every tool below runs on servers you own. No data leaves your jurisdiction.
services.light.ctaSuffix: . I'll audit your current stack for free.
process.light.title: Audit. Plan. Migrate. Done.
about.light.title: A year ago, my own site scored 45/100.
about.light.p1: Embarrassing for someone selling security. So I fixed it. Today: 100/100, with a 10% attack surface. Industry average is 60-70%.
about.light.p2: I've since scanned 599 Swedish law firms (average: 62/100) and 17 cybersecurity companies (average: 73/100). The irony isn't lost on me.
about.light.p3: Now I help businesses replace their cloud stack with open-source tools they actually own. No six-month consulting projects. No junior consultants. You talk to me, I do the work.
contact.light.title: Ready to own your stack?
contact.light.description: Book a 30-minute call. I'll audit your current setup and show you exactly what can be replaced. No pitch, just honest analysis.
services.replace.proton.desc: Zero-knowledge email, calendar, drive. Even Proton can't read your data.
services.replace.coolify.desc: Your servers in Sweden. Full root access. I manage everything.
services.replace.authentik.desc: Self-hosted SSO. SAML, OIDC, LDAP. No per-user pricing.
services.replace.n8n.desc: Unlimited workflows on your server. No per-task fees. You own the code.
services.replace.outline.desc: Beautiful docs, self-hosted. GDPR compliant by default.
services.replace.mattermost.desc: Team chat on your infrastructure. Full message retention control.
process.light.step1.title: Audit
process.light.step1.desc: I scan your current stack. You get a report showing exactly what's leaking data and what's compliant.
process.light.step2.title: Plan
process.light.step2.desc: We pick the replacements that make sense. Not everything needs to change, just the risky parts.
process.light.step3.title: Migrate
process.light.step3.desc: I move your data, set up the new tools, handle the DNS. You keep working.
process.light.step4.title: Monitor
process.light.step4.desc: Monthly security scans. I catch issues before auditors do.
